_comment: All trades + EOD snapshots. The day_0_baseline is the starting reference for cumulative P&L math. Each EOD snapshot under daily_snapshots is required for next-day day-over-day calculations.

daily_snapshots.notes: Full schedule fired today (pre-market, market-open, midday, EOD all ran). 0 trades, 0 positions, P&L $0.00 (0.00%). Day-trade close step had nothing to close. AMZN-2026-05-15 setup proposed pre-market (confidence 6/10, swing long $264-$265.50, R:R 3.0:1) — Approved: NO held into the close; price drifted $267.21 (pre-mkt) → $261.30 (open) → $263.13 (midday) → $263.56 (EOD), never reached entry zone after open and never approved. MSFT Setup #2 PASS held; SMA 20 reclaim ($423.39 vs $417.47) sustained through close = 1 of 2 re-arm conditions met for Monday's pre-market re-evaluation, MACD cross still pending. Infra: ta package install fix held (setuptools+wheel upgrade before pip install -r requirements.txt) — no degraded steps today. RuFlo MCP unavailable (file-only mode) — no vector recall / pattern storage. Discord webhooks still unprovisioned in cloud host — brief logged to memory/pending_discord_updates.md.

daily_snapshots.notes: Week 3 close. 1 open position (GOOGL long, entered 5/20). Equity $99,804.12, down -$195.88 (-0.20%) from the $100,000 baseline — entirely the GOOGL unrealized mark (-0.99%). 0 trades closed this week. GOOGL position within risk rules: 19.58% deployed (< 20% cap), real 10% GTC trailing stop active (order e0b8fbda), well above the -7% cut line. Daily loss cap NOT hit (-0.23% today). Hard rule violations: NONE. Scheduler infra still broken — no EOD routine fired 5/20-5/22; this snapshot is the weekly review's reconciliation.

summary._phase_pnl_note: phase_pnl is the mark-to-market equity change from the $100,000 day-0 baseline. It is unrealized — the single open position (GOOGL) accounts for all of it. No trades have closed yet.
